revision.comment: categorization (via [[WP:JWB]])
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Sun temples |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[Sun temple]]s |listclass = hlist |group1 = [[Surya]] temples
(Indian subcontinent) |list1 = * [[Adithyapuram Sun Temple|Adithyapuram]] * [[Suryanarayana Temple, Arasavalli|Arasavalli]] * [[Unao, Balaji|Balaji]] *[[Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda]] *[[Biranchinarayan Temple, Palia]] * [[Deo Surya Mandir]] * [[Suryanarayana Temple, Gollala Mamidada|Gollala Mamidada]] * [[Gop Temple]] * [[Katarmal#Surya temple|Katarmal]] * [[Konark Sun Temple|Konark]] * [[Martand Sun Temple]] * [[Sun Temple, Modhera|Modhera]] * [[Multan Sun Temple]] * [[Navlakha Temple, Ghumli]] * [[Suryanar Kovil]] |group3 = China |list3 = *[[Temple of the Sun (Beijing)|Beijing's Temple of the Sun]] |group4 = Japan |list4 = *[[Amanawa Shinmei Shrine]] *[[Amanoiwato-jinja]] *[[Ise Grand Shrine]] |group5 = Americas |list5 = *[[Mesa Verde National Park#Astronomy|Mesa Verde's Sun Temple]] *[[Qurikancha]] *[[Temple of the Cross Complex]] |group6 = Others |list6 = *[[Egyptian sun temple]] *[[Temple of the Sun (Rome)|Rome's Temple of the Sun]] }} {{Documentation|content= ==Parameters== {{Collapsible option}} ==See also== * [[:Category:Sun temples]] [[Category:Religion and belief navigational boxes]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Sun temples |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[Sun temple]]s |listclass = hlist |group1 = [[Surya]] temples
(Indian subcontinent) |list1 = * [[:en:Adithyapuram Sun Temple|Adithyapuram]] * [[Suryanarayana Temple, Arasavalli|Arasavalli]] * [[:en:Unao, Balaji|Balaji]] *[[:en:Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda|Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda]] *[[:en:Biranchinarayan Temple, Palia|Biranchinarayan Temple, Palia]] * [[:en:Deo Surya Mandir|Deo Surya Mandir]] * [[Suryanarayana Temple, Gollala Mamidada|Gollala Mamidada]] * [[:en:Gop Temple|Gop Temple]] * [[Katarmal#Surya temple|Katarmal]] * [[:en:Konark Sun Temple|Konark]] * [[:en:Martand Sun Temple|Martand Sun Temple]] * [[Sun Temple, Modhera|Modhera]] * [[:en:Multan Sun Temple|Multan Sun Temple]] * [[:en:Navlakha Temple, Ghumli|Navlakha Temple, Ghumli]] * [[Suryanar Kovil]] |group3 = China |list3 = *[[:en:Temple of the Sun (Beijing)|Beijing's Temple of the Sun]] |group4 = Japan |list4 = *[[Amanawa Shinmei Shrine]] *[[Amanoiwato Shrine]] *[[Ise Grand Shrine]] |group5 = Americas |list5 = *[[Mesa Verde National Park#Astronomy|Mesa Verde's Sun Temple]] *[[:en:Qurikancha|Qurikancha]] *[[:en:Temple of the Cross Complex|Temple of the Cross Complex]] |group6 = Others |list6 = *[[:en:Egyptian sun temple|Egyptian sun temple]] *[[Temple of the Sun (Rome)|Rome's Temple of the Sun]] }} {{Documentation|content= ==Parameters== {{Collapsible option}} ==See also== * [[:Category:Sun temples]] [[Category:Religion and belief navigational boxes]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
